requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 as International Baseline for Vanuatu BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作为瓦努阿图BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作為萬那杜BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Vanuatu does not have a confirmed formal national standards body with mandatory BESS-specific product safety regulations. The Department of Energy (DoE) under the Ministry of Climate Change and Natural Disasters promotes renewable energy and storage deployment, but no mandatory pre-market BESS product safety conformity regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or similar frameworks has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. This regulatory gap is flagged honestly. In practice, BESS projects in Vanuatu funded or supported through development finance institutions (ADB, World Bank, IRENA Pacific programmes) or Engie/UNELCO's own procurement processes reference international standards including IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62933-5-1 (Safety Considerations for Electrical Energy Storage Systems). IEC 63056 (Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems) addresses field performance characteristics for stationary BESS. As a Pacific SIDS, Vanuatu's tropical climate (high humidity, salt-mist, cyclone exposure) imposes additional environmental stress on BESS cells and modules; environmental ratings per IEC 60068 or equivalent are an implicit project requirement. Exporters and project developers should verify applicable project-level technical requirements directly with URA, UNELCO-VUI, and any financing or development partner.
summary.zh: 瓦努阿图尚未确认设有具有强制性BESS专属产品安全法规的正式国家标准机构。气候变化与自然灾害部下属能源部（DoE）推动可再生能源和储能部署，但截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认与欧盟《电池法规》或类似框架相当的强制性BESS产品上市前安全合规法规。诚实标注这一监管空白。实践中，通过开发性金融机构（亚行、世界银行、国际可再生能源署太平洋项目）资助或支持的瓦努阿图BESS项目，或经由Engie/UNELCO自身采购流程的项目，通常引用国际标准，包括IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62933-5-1（电化学储能系统安全考量）。IEC 63056（电化学储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池要求）针对固定式BESS的现场性能特性。作为太平洋小岛屿发展中国家，瓦努阿图的热带气候（高湿度、盐雾、热带气旋暴露）对BESS电芯和模组构成额外环境应力；按IEC 60068或同等标准的环境防护等级是项目的隐性要求。出口商和项目开发商应直接向URA、UNELCO-VUI及任何融资或开发合作伙伴核实适用的项目级技术要求。
summary.zht: 萬那杜尚未確認設有具有強制性BESS專屬產品安全法規的正式國家標準機構。氣候變化與自然災害部下屬能源部（DoE）推動可再生能源和儲能部署，但截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認與歐盟《電池法規》或類似框架相當的強制性BESS產品上市前安全合規法規。誠實標註這一監管空白。實踐中，通過開發性金融機構（亞行、世界銀行、國際可再生能源署太平洋項目）資助或支持的萬那杜BESS項目，或經由Engie/UNELCO自身採購流程的項目，通常引用國際標準，包括IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62933-5-1（電化學儲能系統安全考量）。IEC 63056（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池要求）針對固定式BESS的現場性能特性。作為太平洋小島嶼發展中國家，萬那杜的熱帶氣候（高濕度、鹽霧、熱帶氣旋暴露）對BESS電芯和模組構成額外環境應力；按IEC 60068或同等標準的環境防護等級是項目的隱性要求。出口商和項目開發商應直接向URA、UNELCO-VUI及任何融資或開發合作夥伴核實適用的項目級技術要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; expected project-specification reference in Vanuatu)

IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary Cells and Batteries Containing Alkaline or Other Non-Acid Electrolytes — Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems (field-use stationary BESS performance standard)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
IEC 60068 — Environmental testing (humidity, salt-mist, vibration — particularly relevant given Vanuatu cyclone and coastal environment)
Vanuatu Department of Energy (DoE) — no confirmed mandatory BESS product safety regulation as of dataset date; verify directly with DoE and URA

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. GB 38031-2020 (Electric Vehicles — Traction Battery Safety Requirements) is a Chinese EV battery standard that is sometimes cited in BESS context but is not the applicable stationary BESS standard. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 in international project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Chinese environmental test ratings for tropical climate conditions may not cover Vanuatu's cyclone wind-load and salt-mist requirements — additional environmental testing may be required.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）是中国电动汽车电池标准，有时被引用于BESS语境，但并非适用的固定式BESS标准。上述中国标准不被国际项目规格接受为IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依据。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。中国针对热带气候条件的环境测试评级可能不涵盖瓦努阿图的热带气旋风荷载和盐雾要求——可能需要额外的环境测试。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）是中國電動汽車電池標準，有時被引用於BESS語境，但並非適用的固定式BESS標準。上述中國標準不被國際項目規格接受為IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依據。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。中國針對熱帶氣候條件的環境測試評級可能不涵蓋萬那杜的熱帶氣旋風荷載和鹽霧要求——可能需要額外的環境測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specification for Battery Management Systems in Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Stations)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed mandatory BESS product safety regulation exists for Vanuatu as of the dataset date — this is a regulatory gap, not a gap-free situation. In practice, international development-financed BESS projects and UNELCO/Engie procurement standards reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence. Key gaps for Chinese exporters: (a) obtain IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory — Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications; (b) verify that environmental ratings cover Vanuatu's tropical conditions — salt-mist (IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent), high humidity, and cyclone mechanical shock/vibration loads not typically addressed in Chinese domestic BESS certification; (c) confirm applicable standard editions and any project-level derogations with the project owner, UNELCO-VUI, and any development finance institution environmental and social standards; (d) verify the current DoE and URA position on product safety requirements with qualified in-country professionals before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，瓦努阿图尚无经确认的强制性BESS产品安全法规——这是监管空白，而非无差距情形。实践中，国际开发融资BESS项目和UNELCO/Engie采购标准将IEC 62619作为预期安全证据。中国出口商的主要差距：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619和IEC 63056型式试验证书——中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据；（b）核实环境防护等级是否涵盖瓦努阿图热带条件——盐雾（IEC 60068-2-52或同等标准）、高湿度及热带气旋机械冲击/振动荷载，通常在中国国内BESS认证中未予涉及；（c）与项目业主、UNELCO-VUI及任何开发性金融机构的环境和社会标准确认适用标准版本及任何项目级豁免；（d）在出货前与有资质的当地专业人士核实DoE和URA现行产品安全要求立场。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，萬那杜尚無經確認的強制性BESS產品安全法規——這是監管空白，而非無差距情形。實踐中，國際開發融資BESS項目和UNELCO/Engie採購標準將IEC 62619作為預期安全證據。中國出口商的主要差距：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619和IEC 63056型式試驗證書——中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據；（b）核實環境防護等級是否涵蓋萬那杜熱帶條件——鹽霧（IEC 60068-2-52或同等標準）、高濕度及熱帶氣旋機械衝擊/振動荷載，通常在中國國內BESS認證中未予涉及；（c）與項目業主、UNELCO-VUI及任何開發性金融機構的環境和社會標準確認適用標準版本及任何項目級豁免；（d）在出貨前與有資質的當地專業人士核實DoE和URA現行產品安全要求立場。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed mandatory standalone BESS product safety regulation for Vanuatu as of dataset date — regulatory gap flagged; IEC 62619 is the expected technical baseline for project specifications and development-finance procurement; verify directly with URA, DoE, and UNELCO-VUI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Vanuatu as of the dataset date — this is an honest regulatory gap, not an absence of standards risk. IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 are the internationally expected technical baselines for BESS cell and module safety in project specifications and development-finance procurement in Vanuatu. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for project acceptance. Additional environmental certification for tropical, salt-mist, and cyclone conditions (IEC 60068 series or equivalent) is a Vanuatu-specific requirement not covered by standard Chinese domestic BESS certification. Verify current DoE and URA requirements and confirm IEC evidence expectations with the project owner, UNELCO-VUI, and any development finance partner before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，瓦努阿图尚未确认独立强制性BESS产品安全法规——这是诚实的监管空白，而非无标准风险情形。IEC 62619和IEC 63056是瓦努阿图项目规格和开发融资采购中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足项目验收要求。热带、盐雾和热带气旋条件下的附加环境认证（IEC 60068系列或同等标准）是瓦努阿图专项要求，未涵盖于标准中国国内BESS认证。出货前请核实DoE和URA现行要求，并向项目业主、UNELCO-VUI及任何开发融资合作伙伴确认IEC证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，萬那杜尚未確認獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規——這是誠實的監管空白，而非無標準風險情形。IEC 62619和IEC 63056是萬那杜項目規格和開發融資採購中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足項目驗收要求。熱帶、鹽霧和熱帶氣旋條件下的附加環境認證（IEC 60068系列或同等標準）是萬那杜專項要求，未涵蓋於標準中國國內BESS認證。出貨前請核實DoE和URA現行要求，並向項目業主、UNELCO-VUI及任何開發融資合作夥伴確認IEC證據要求。
